title: Thai Creamy Noodle Soup
description: A spicy and creamy Thai-inspired noodle soup with your choice of protein. Easy to make and perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: chicken breast
ingredients.notes: or substitute with tofu for a vegetarian option

instructions: Bring the vegetable broth to a boil in a large pot.
Add the noodles and cook according to package instructions.
In a separate pan, heat the coconut milk over medium heat.
Add the curry paste and stir until fragrant.
Add the chicken breast and cook until cooked through.
Combine the cooked noodles and chicken in the pot with the vegetable broth.
Add the coconut milk mixture and stir to combine.
Add the green onions and bean sprouts, if using.
Simmer the soup for 5-10 minutes to allow the flavors to meld.
Serve hot, garnished with additional green onions and bean sprouts, if desired.
